title: tovaria formosana
intro: Tovaria formosana, also known as Formosan tovaria, is a plant species native to Taiwan that belongs to the family Celastraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Research has shown that the plant has various health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or even used as a topical application to harness its therapeutic benefits.
